title: SQL Mission 8: Latest Order Per Customer

initialState.content:
-- Mission 8 Guidelines
-- Join customers and orders
-- Rank orders by order_date desc per customer
-- Keep rank = 1

WITH ranked AS (
  SELECT
    c.customer_id,
    c.name,
    o.order_id,
    o.order_date,
    -- TODO row_number
  FROM customers c
  INNER JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id
)
SELECT
  -- TODO
FROM ranked
WHERE
  -- TODO
ORDER BY name;

rules: must_include:row_number() over (partition by c.customer_id order by o.order_date desc) as rn
